name: Starry Knight Ceremony
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖なる降誕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ホーリーナイツ・ナティビティ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During your Main Phase: You can reveal 1 LIGHT Fairy monster in your hand, and if you do, add 1 Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand, then place that revealed monster on the bottom of your Deck. If your opponent activates a card or effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster from your hand. You can only use 1 "Starry Knight Ceremony" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can reveal 1 LIGHT Fairy monster in your hand, and if you do, add 1 Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster from your Deck to your hand, then place that revealed monster on the bottom of your Deck. If your opponent activates a card or effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 7 LIGHT Dragon monster from your hand. You can only use 1 "Starry Knight Ceremony" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Returns from your hand to your Deck
